title: ホロウソロウ
description:
-This is the story of one wish

Hollow Sorrow is a story-driven exploration adventure game with the theme of "facing the past".

*Currently, the main game is only available in Japanese.

[Story]The setting is Yunekeel, a land of longing.

There is a "miracle that grants wishes".

However, only the "sinless" can receive this miracle.

The protagonist, Patrania, is a young man with amnesia.

All he remembers is that he "had a wish he wanted to fulfill" and that "he once committed a crime".

To remember his past, atone for his sins, and fulfill his wish, he wanders into a fantastical "The world of memories".

Your role is to guide him and remember the past together.

But the past is not bright.

As the story progresses, the full extent of his sins will be revealed.

Whether you can make this journey a happy one depends on your choices.

[How to play]- Explore the "The world of memories" and collect fragments of memories

- Judge whether the collected memories are good or bad

- The world and ending change depending on the accumulation of choices

- Choices sometimes affect the fate of characters other than the protagonist

[Features]- Easy to play volume

- Warm and unique fantasy world view

- Conversations with characters with various pasts

- Heartfelt story depicting hope and rebirth

- It's up to you to turn the story into despair

- There's no turning back

[About distribution]Live play and monetization are permitted within the bounds of public order and morals. If you like, please paste the URL of this store page in the description.

Of course, don't forget to be considerate of spoilers and extreme scenes!
description_short: Hollow Sorrow is a dark yet heartwarming 2D exploration adventure game where you confront your lost past.
